# COSAI TSC Meeting Planning — Issue Labels

| Label | Color | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `proposed` | #FBCA04 (yellow) | Suggested agenda item, not yet scheduled |
| `agenda-item` | #0075CA (blue) | Confirmed on a meeting agenda |
| `action-item` | #E4E669 (light yellow) | Follow-up task from a meeting |
| `carry-over` | #D93F0B (orange) | Item moved from a prior week |
| `in-progress` | #0E8A16 (green) | Action item actively being worked |
